reviews.comment:
Veníamos de las termas de tinogastay pasamos por la estación ypf excelente la atención de los chicos  BRAVO ASU SE ATIENDE A LOS TURISTA

(Translated by Google)
We were coming from the Tinogastay hot springs and passed by the YPF station. The service from the guys was excellent! BRAVO! ASU, THEY REALLY TAKE CARE OF TOURISTS!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, hay un mini shop donde puedes comprar de todo con muy buenos y accesibles precios.

La estación en buen estado, lástima que el inflador de aire perdía bastante y era imposible utilizarle.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and there's a mini-shop where you can buy everything at very good and affordable prices.

The station was in good condition, it's a shame the air pump leaked so much it was unusable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNX3VmY0pBEAE
